response.global_analysis: Video contains segments of three songs: 'BANG!!!', 'Rolling Girl', and 'Betelgeuse'. The Reference JSON provided only partial lyrics for each, so I am transcribing the full vocal performance based on the audio waveform. Timing is strictly synchronized to the vocal starts and ends, with segments split logically at audio pauses. All on-screen titles for the songs are acknowledged and used to ensure correct spelling and context.
